creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193920
py-openstackdocstheme.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn for the Python package textproc/py-openstackdocstheme, which provides theme and extension support for Sphinx documentation that is published to docs.openstack.org and developer.openstack.org.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
